Provider Trans - Other Methods CHAR 1 This column documents whether the transmission route of patient's current reconciled medication list to subsequent provider was an alternate method such as text, email or CD. 0 = No
1 = Yes
^ = Blank
449 CRNT_MDCTN_LST_RSDNT_CD CRNT_MDCTN_LST_RSDNT_CD Current Reconciled Medication List - Ptnt/Fam/Care CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the facility provided the patient’s current reconciled medication list to the patient,
